title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, embed, list models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to your local Ollama instance; no data leaves your machine.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style autocomplete and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, and manage models inside JVM apps or Android.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + LangChain; run locally in 5 min.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using your local Ollama models; slash commands & thread support.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows (chat, generate, embed).

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed chat, embeddings, and model management; targets .NET 6+.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that exposes Ollama chat & embeddings endpoints with built-in rate limiting and auth.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that forwards channel mentions to a local Ollama instance and replies in thread.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, list, and delete models from Go programs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async/await bindings to Ollama’s REST API with serde types and streaming support.
